data.name: VRInitializeException_Unknown
data.value: An unknown initialization error occurred.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_InstallationNotFound
data.value: The OpenVR installation was not found.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_InstallationCorrupt
data.value: The OpenVR installation is corrupted.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_VRClientDLLNotFound
data.value: vrclient.dll was not found.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_FileNotFound
data.value: A required configuration file was not found.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_FactoryNotFound
data.value: Failed to obtain the factory interface.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_InterfaceNotFound
data.value: The requested interface was not found.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_InvalidInterface
data.value: The interface is invalid.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_UserConfigDirectoryInvalid
data.value: The user config directory is invalid.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_HmdNotFound
data.value: The HMD was not found or is not connected.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_NotInitialized
data.value: OpenVR has not been initialized.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_PathRegistryNotFound
data.value: The path registry was not found.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_NoConfigPath
data.value: No configuration path is set.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_NoLogPath
data.value: No log path is set.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_PathRegistryNotWritable
data.value: The path registry is not writable.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_AppInfoInitFailed
data.value: Failed to initialize application info.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_Retry
data.value: A retry is required.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_InitCanceledByUser
data.value: Initialization was canceled by the user.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_AnotherAppLaunching
data.value: Another application is currently launching.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_SettingsInitFailed
data.value: Failed to initialize settings.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_ShuttingDown
data.value: The system is shutting down.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_TooManyObjects
data.value: Too many objects.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_NoServerForBackgroundApp
data.value: There is no server for the background app.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_NotSupportedWithCompositor
data.value: Not supported when the compositor is in use.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_NotAvailableToUtilityApps
data.value: Not available to utility apps.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_Internal
data.value: An internal error occurred.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_HmdDriverIdIsNone
data.value: The HMD driver ID is None.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_HmdNotFoundPresenceFailed
data.value: Failed to detect HMD presence.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_VRMonitorNotFound
data.value: The VR monitor was not found.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_VRMonitorStartupFailed
data.value: Failed to start the VR monitor.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_LowPowerWatchdogNotSupported
data.value: The low power watchdog is not supported.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_InvalidApplicationType
data.value: The application type is invalid.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_NotAvailableToWatchdogApps
data.value: Not available to watchdog apps.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_WatchdogDisabledInSettings
data.value: The watchdog is disabled in settings.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_VRDashboardNotFound
data.value: The VR dashboard was not found.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_VRDashboardStartupFailed
data.value: Failed to start the VR dashboard.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_VRHomeNotFound
data.value: VR Home was not found.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_VRHomeStartupFailed
data.value: Failed to start VR Home.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_RebootingBusy
data.value: Busy while rebooting.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_FirmwareUpdateBusy
data.value: Busy while updating firmware.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_FirmwareRecoveryBusy
data.value: Busy while recovering firmware.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_USBServiceBusy
data.value: The USB service is busy.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_VRWebHelperStartupFailed
data.value: Failed to start the VR Web Helper.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_TrackerManagerInitFailed
data.value: Failed to initialize the tracker manager.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_AlreadyRunning
data.value: Already running.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_FailedForVrMonitor
data.value: Failed to initialize the process for the VR monitor.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_PropertyManagerInitFailed
data.value: Failed to initialize the property manager.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_WebServerFailed
data.value: Failed to start the web server.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_IllegalTypeTransition
data.value: Illegal type transition.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_MismatchedRuntimes
data.value: Runtime versions do not match.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_InvalidProcessId
data.value: The process ID is invalid.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_VRServiceStartupFailed
data.value: Failed to start the VR service.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_PrismNeedsNewDrivers
data.value: The Prism driver needs to be updated.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_PrismStartupTimedOut
data.value: Prism startup timed out.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_CouldNotStartPrism
data.value: Could not start Prism.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Init_PrismExitedUnexpectedly
data.value: Prism exited unexpectedly.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Steam_SteamInstallationNotFound
data.value: The Steam installation was not found.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Driver_Failed
data.value: A driver error occurred.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Driver_Unknown
data.value: An unknown driver error occurred.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Driver_HmdUnknown
data.value: An unknown HMD driver.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Driver_NotLoaded
data.value: The driver is not loaded.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Driver_RuntimeOutOfDate
data.value: The driver runtime is out of date.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Driver_HmdInUse
data.value: The HMD is in use by another process.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Driver_NotCalibrated
data.value: The driver is not calibrated.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Driver_CalibrationInvalid
data.value: The driver calibration data is invalid.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Driver_HmdDisplayNotFound
data.value: The HMD display was not found.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Driver_TrackedDeviceInterfaceUnknown
data.value: The tracked device interface is unknown.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Driver_HmdDriverIdOutOfBounds
data.value: The HMD driver ID is out of bounds.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Driver_HmdDisplayMirrored
data.value: The HMD display is set to mirrored.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Driver_HmdDisplayNotFoundLaptop
data.value: The laptop HMD display was not found.

data.name: VRInitializeException_IPC_ServerInitFailed
data.value: Failed to initialize the IPC server.

data.name: VRInitializeException_IPC_ConnectFailed
data.value: Failed to connect via IPC.

data.name: VRInitializeException_IPC_SharedStateInitFailed
data.value: Failed to initialize shared state.

data.name: VRInitializeException_IPC_CompositorInitFailed
data.value: Failed to initialize the compositor.

data.name: VRInitializeException_IPC_MutexInitFailed
data.value: Failed to initialize the mutex.

data.name: VRInitializeException_IPC_Failed
data.value: An IPC connection error occurred.

data.name: VRInitializeException_IPC_CompositorConnectFailed
data.value: Failed to connect to the compositor.

data.name: VRInitializeException_IPC_CompositorInvalidConnectResponse
data.value: The connection response from the compositor is invalid.

data.name: VRInitializeException_IPC_ConnectFailedAfterMultipleAttempts
data.value: IPC connection failed after multiple attempts.

data.name: VRInitializeException_IPC_ConnectFailedAfterTargetExited
data.value: IPC connection failed after the target exited.

data.name: VRInitializeException_IPC_NamespaceUnavailable
data.value: The IPC namespace is unavailable.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_Failed
data.value: The compositor failed.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_D3D11HardwareRequired
data.value: Direct3D 11 hardware is required.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_FirmwareRequiresUpdate
data.value: A firmware update is required for the compositor.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_OverlayInitFailed
data.value: Failed to initialize the compositor overlay.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_ScreenshotsInitFailed
data.value: Failed to initialize compositor screenshots.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_UnableToCreateDevice
data.value: Unable to create the graphics device.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_SharedStateIsNull
data.value: The shared state is null.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_NotificationManagerIsNull
data.value: The notification manager is null.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_ResourceManagerClientIsNull
data.value: The resource manager client is null.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_MessageOverlaySharedStateInitFailure
data.value: Failed to initialize the message overlay shared state.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_PropertiesInterfaceIsNull
data.value: The properties interface is null.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_CreateFullscreenWindowFailed
data.value: Failed to create the fullscreen window.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_SettingsInterfaceIsNull
data.value: The settings interface is null.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_FailedToShowWindow
data.value: Failed to show the window.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_DistortInterfaceIsNull
data.value: The distortion interface is null.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_DisplayFrequencyFailure
data.value: Failed to get the display frequency.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_RendererInitializationFailed
data.value: Failed to initialize the renderer.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_DXGIFactoryInterfaceIsNull
data.value: The DXGI factory interface is null.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_DXGIFactoryCreateFailed
data.value: Failed to create the DXGI factory.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_DXGIFactoryQueryFailed
data.value: Failed to query the DXGI factory.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_InvalidAdapterDesktop
data.value: The desktop adapter is invalid.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_InvalidHmdAttachment
data.value: The HMD attachment is invalid.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_InvalidOutputDesktop
data.value: The output desktop is invalid.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_InvalidDeviceProvided
data.value: The provided device is invalid.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_D3D11RendererInitializationFailed
data.value: Failed to initialize the D3D11 renderer.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_FailedToFindDisplayMode
data.value: Failed to find a display mode.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_FailedToCreateSwapChain
data.value: Failed to create the swap chain.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_FailedToGetBackBuffer
data.value: Failed to get the back buffer.

data.value: Failed to create the render target.

data.value: Failed to create the DXGI2 swap chain.

data.value: Failed to create the DXGI2 render target.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_FailedToGetDXGIDeviceInterface
data.value: Failed to get the DXGI device interface.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_SelectDisplayMode
data.value: Failed to select a display mode.

data.value: Failed to create NvAPI render targets.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_NvAPISetDisplayMode
data.value: Failed to set the NvAPI display mode.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_FailedToCreateDirectModeDisplay
data.value: Failed to create the direct mode display.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_InvalidHmdPropertyContainer
data.value: The HMD property container is invalid.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_UpdateDisplayFrequency
data.value: Failed to update the display frequency.

data.value: Failed to create the rasterizer state.

data.value: Failed to create the NoWrite depth stencil state.

data.value: Failed to create the flush texture.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_CreateDistortionSurfaces
data.value: Failed to create the distortion surfaces.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_CreateConstantBuffer
data.value: Failed to create the constant buffer.

data.value: Failed to create the HMD pose constant buffer.

data.value: Failed to create the scene texture index buffer.

data.value: Failed to create the geometry constant buffer.

data.value: Failed to create the panel mask buffer.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_CreatePixelSimUBO
data.value: Failed to create PixelSimUBO.

data.value: Failed to create MSAA render textures.

data.value: Failed to create compute resolve render textures.

data.value: Failed to create driver direct mode resolve textures.

data.value: Failed to open driver direct mode resolve textures.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_CreateFallbackSyncTexture
data.value: Failed to create the fallback sync texture.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_ShareFallbackSyncTexture
data.value: Failed to share the fallback sync texture.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_CreateOverlayIndexBuffer
data.value: Failed to create the overlay index buffer.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_CreateOverlayVertexBuffer
data.value: Failed to create the overlay vertex buffer.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_CreateTextVertexBuffer
data.value: Failed to create the text vertex buffer.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_CreateTextIndexBuffer
data.value: Failed to create the text index buffer.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_CreateMirrorTextures
data.value: Failed to create mirror textures.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_CreateLastFrameRenderTexture
data.value: Failed to create the last frame render texture.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_CreateMirrorOverlay
data.value: Failed to create the mirror overlay.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_FailedToCreateVirtualDisplayBackbuffer
data.value: Failed to create the virtual display backbuffer.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_DisplayModeNotSupported
data.value: The display mode is not supported.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_CreateOverlayInvalidCall
data.value: The overlay creation call is invalid.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_CreateOverlayAlreadyInitialized
data.value: The overlay is already initialized.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_FailedToCreateMailbox
data.value: Failed to create the mailbox.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_WindowInterfaceIsNull
data.value: The window interface is null.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_SystemLayerCreateInstance
data.value: Failed to create the system layer instance.

data.name: VRInitializeException_Compositor_SystemLayerCreateSession
data.value: Failed to create the system layer session.

data.name: VRInitializeException_VendorSpecific_UnableToConnectToOculusRuntime
data.value: Unable to connect to the Oculus runtime.

data.name: VRInitializeException_VendorSpecific_WindowsNotInDevMode
data.value: Windows is not in developer mode.

data.name: VRInitializeException_VendorSpecific_HmdFound_CantOpenDevice
data.value: Could not open the HMD device.

data.name: VRInitializeException_VendorSpecific_HmdFound_UnableToRequestConfigStart
data.value: Failed to request the start of HMD configuration.

data.name: VRInitializeException_VendorSpecific_HmdFound_NoStoredConfig
data.value: No configuration is stored on the HMD.

data.name: VRInitializeException_VendorSpecific_HmdFound_ConfigTooBig
data.value: The HMD configuration data is too large.

data.name: VRInitializeException_VendorSpecific_HmdFound_ConfigTooSmall
data.value: The HMD configuration data is too small.

data.name: VRInitializeException_VendorSpecific_HmdFound_UnableToInitZLib
data.value: Failed to initialize zlib.

data.name: VRInitializeException_VendorSpecific_HmdFound_CantReadFirmwareVersion
data.value: Failed to read the firmware version.

data.name: VRInitializeException_VendorSpecific_HmdFound_UnableToSendUserDataStart
data.value: Failed to start sending user data.

data.name: VRInitializeException_VendorSpecific_HmdFound_UnableToGetUserDataStart
data.value: Failed to start getting user data.

data.name: VRInitializeException_VendorSpecific_HmdFound_UnableToGetUserDataNext
data.value: Failed to get the next frame of user data.

data.name: VRInitializeException_VendorSpecific_HmdFound_UserDataAddressRange
data.value: A user data address range error occurred.

data.name: VRInitializeException_VendorSpecific_HmdFound_UserDataError
data.value: A user data error occurred.

data.name: VRInitializeException_VendorSpecific_HmdFound_ConfigFailedSanityCheck
data.value: The HMD configuration data failed a sanity check.

data.name: VRInitializeException_VendorSpecific_OculusRuntimeBadInstall
data.value: The Oculus runtime installation is incomplete.

data.name: VRInitializeException_UnexpectedError
data.value: An unexpected initialization error occurred: {0}

data.name: VRApplicationException_AppKeyAlreadyExists
data.value: The specified application key already exists.

data.name: VRApplicationException_NoManifest
data.value: The application manifest was not found.

data.name: VRApplicationException_NoApplication
data.value: The specified application was not found.

data.name: VRApplicationException_InvalidIndex
data.value: The index is invalid.

data.name: VRApplicationException_UnknownApplication
data.value: Unknown application.

data.name: VRApplicationException_IPCFailed
data.value: Inter-process communication (IPC) failed.

data.name: VRApplicationException_ApplicationAlreadyRunning
data.value: The application is already running.

data.name: VRApplicationException_InvalidManifest
data.value: The manifest file is invalid.

data.name: VRApplicationException_InvalidApplication
data.value: The application configuration is invalid.

data.name: VRApplicationException_LaunchFailed
data.value: Failed to launch the application.

data.name: VRApplicationException_ApplicationAlreadyStarting
data.value: The application is already starting.

data.name: VRApplicationException_LaunchInProgress
data.value: Another launch is already in progress.

data.name: VRApplicationException_OldApplicationQuitting
data.value: Cannot launch because the previous application is still quitting.

data.name: VRApplicationException_TransitionAborted
data.value: The application transition was aborted.

data.name: VRApplicationException_IsTemplate
data.value: The specified application is a template and cannot be launched directly.

data.name: VRApplicationException_SteamVRIsExiting
data.value: Cannot complete the request because SteamVR is exiting.

data.name: VRApplicationException_BufferTooSmall
data.value: The buffer size is insufficient.

data.name: VRApplicationException_PropertyNotSet
data.value: The property is not set.

data.name: VRApplicationException_UnknownProperty
data.value: An unknown property was requested.

data.name: VRApplicationException_InvalidParameter
data.value: The parameter is invalid.

data.name: VRApplicationException_NotImplemented
data.value: The requested feature is not implemented.

data.name: VRApplicationException_UnexpectedError
data.value: An unexpected application error occurred: {0}

data.name: VROverlayException_UnknownOverlay
data.value: The specified overlay was not found.

data.name: VROverlayException_InvalidHandle
data.value: The overlay handle is invalid.

data.name: VROverlayException_PermissionDenied
data.value: You do not have permission to perform this overlay operation.

data.name: VROverlayException_OverlayLimitExceeded
data.value: The maximum number of VR overlays (e.g. 128) has been reached.

data.name: VROverlayException_WrongVisibilityType
data.value: This visibility type is not supported for this operation.

data.name: VROverlayException_KeyTooLong
data.value: The overlay key is too long.

data.name: VROverlayException_NameTooLong
data.value: The overlay name is too long.

data.name: VROverlayException_KeyInUse
data.value: This key (string ID) is already used by another overlay.

data.name: VROverlayException_WrongTransformType
data.value: The requested transform type (Absolute/TrackedDevice, etc.) is not supported for this overlay.

data.name: VROverlayException_InvalidTrackedDevice
data.value: The specified tracked device index is invalid or not connected.

data.name: VROverlayException_InvalidParameter
data.value: The parameter is invalid.

data.name: VROverlayException_ThumbnailCantBeDestroyed
data.value: A thumbnail overlay cannot be destroyed on its own.

data.name: VROverlayException_ArrayTooSmall
data.value: The provided buffer size is insufficient.

data.name: VROverlayException_RequestFailed
data.value: The OpenVR request failed.

data.name: VROverlayException_InvalidTexture
data.value: The texture handle or pointer is invalid.

data.name: VROverlayException_UnableToLoadFile
data.value: Failed to load the file (PNG, manifest, etc.). Check the path.

data.name: VROverlayException_KeyboardAlreadyInUse
data.value: The VR system keyboard is already in use by another process.

data.name: VROverlayException_NoNeighbor
data.value: No neighboring overlay was found.

data.name: VROverlayException_TooManyMaskPrimitives
data.value: The mask primitive limit was exceeded.

data.name: VROverlayException_BadMaskPrimitive
data.value: The mask primitive format is invalid.

data.name: VROverlayException_TextureAlreadyLocked
data.value: The texture is already locked.

data.name: VROverlayException_TextureLockCapacityReached
data.value: The texture lock capacity has been reached.

data.name: VROverlayException_TextureNotLocked
data.value: The texture must be locked before this operation.

data.name: VROverlayException_UnexpectedError
data.value: An unexpected error occurred: {0}

data.name: VRCompositorException_RequestFailed
data.value: The request to the compositor failed.

data.name: VRCompositorException_IncompatibleVersion
data.value: The application's compositor version is incompatible with the runtime.

data.name: VRCompositorException_DoNotHaveFocus
data.value: The application does not currently have focus.

data.name: VRCompositorException_InvalidTexture
data.value: The submitted texture is invalid.

data.name: VRCompositorException_IsNotSceneApplication
data.value: The application is not registered as a scene application.

data.name: VRCompositorException_TextureIsOnWrongDevice
data.value: The texture was created on a different graphics device.

data.name: VRCompositorException_TextureUsesUnsupportedFormat
data.value: The texture format is not supported by the compositor.

data.name: VRCompositorException_SharedTexturesNotSupported
data.value: Shared textures are not supported on this system.

data.name: VRCompositorException_IndexOutOfRange
data.value: The texture index is out of range.

data.name: VRCompositorException_AlreadySubmitted
data.value: A frame for this eye has already been submitted.

data.name: VRCompositorException_InvalidBounds
data.value: The submitted texture bounds are invalid.

data.name: VRCompositorException_AlreadySet
data.value: The compositor property is already set.

data.name: VRInputException_NameNotFound
data.value: The specified input action or path was not found.

data.name: VRInputException_WrongType
data.value: The requested input type does not match the expected type.

data.name: VRInputException_InvalidHandle
data.value: An invalid input handle was specified.

data.name: VRInputException_InvalidParam
data.value: An invalid parameter was specified.

data.name: VRInputException_NoSteam
data.value: Steam or SteamVR is not available.

data.name: VRInputException_MaxCapacityReached
data.value: The maximum number of internal resources has been reached.

data.name: VRInputException_IPCError
data.value: An error occurred during IPC communication with SteamVR.

data.name: VRInputException_NoActiveActionSet
data.value: No active action set is configured.

data.name: VRInputException_InvalidDevice
data.value: An invalid device was specified.

data.name: VRInputException_InvalidSkeleton
data.value: The skeleton data is invalid.

data.name: VRInputException_InvalidBoneCount
data.value: The bone count is incorrect.

data.name: VRInputException_InvalidCompressedData
data.value: The compressed data is invalid.

data.name: VRInputException_NoData
data.value: No input data is available.

data.name: VRInputException_BufferTooSmall
data.value: The specified buffer size is insufficient.

data.name: VRInputException_MismatchedActionManifest
data.value: The currently loaded action manifest does not match.

data.name: VRInputException_MissingSkeletonData
data.value: Required skeleton data is missing.

data.name: VRInputException_InvalidBoneIndex
data.value: An invalid bone index was specified.

data.name: VRInputException_InvalidPriority
data.value: An invalid priority was specified.

data.name: VRInputException_PermissionDenied
data.value: Access to the requested operation was denied.

data.name: VRInputException_InvalidRenderModel
data.value: An invalid render model was specified.

data.name: VRInputException_UnexpectedError
data.value: An unexpected input error occurred: {0}

data.name: VRNotificationException_InvalidNotificationId
data.value: Invalid notification ID. The notification does not exist or has already been removed.

data.name: VRNotificationException_NotificationQueueFull
data.value: The notification queue is full. No more notifications can be added.

data.name: VRNotificationException_InvalidOverlayHandle
data.value: Invalid overlay handle.

data.name: VRNotificationException_SystemWithUserValueAlreadyExists
data.value: A notification with the same UserValue already exists.

data.name: VRRenderModelException_Loading
data.value: The render model is currently loading.

data.name: VRRenderModelException_NotSupported
data.value: The render model feature is not supported in this environment.

data.name: VRRenderModelException_InvalidArg
data.value: An invalid argument was specified.

data.name: VRRenderModelException_InvalidModel
data.value: The render model is invalid or corrupted.

data.name: VRRenderModelException_NoShapes
data.value: The render model does not contain any shape data.

data.name: VRRenderModelException_MultipleShapes
data.value: Multiple shapes were detected, but only a single shape is supported.

data.name: VRRenderModelException_TooManyVertices
data.value: The render model has too many vertices.

data.name: VRRenderModelException_MultipleTextures
data.value: Multiple textures were detected, but only a single texture is supported.

data.name: VRRenderModelException_BufferTooSmall
data.value: The buffer size is insufficient.

data.name: VRRenderModelException_NotEnoughNormals
data.value: There is not enough normal data.

data.name: VRRenderModelException_NotEnoughTexCoords
data.value: There is not enough texture coordinate data.

data.name: VRRenderModelException_InvalidTexture
data.value: The texture data is invalid or corrupted.

data.name: VRRenderModelException_UnexpectedError
data.value: An unknown render model error occurred. ({0})

data.name: VRScreenshotException_None
data.value: No error occurred.

data.name: VRScreenshotException_RequestFailed
data.value: The screenshot request failed.

data.name: VRScreenshotException_IncompatibleVersion
data.value: The screenshot API version is incompatible.

data.name: VRScreenshotException_NotFound
data.value: The specified screenshot was not found.

data.name: VRScreenshotException_BufferTooSmall
data.value: The provided buffer size is insufficient.

data.name: VRScreenshotException_ScreenshotAlreadyInProgress
data.value: Another screenshot operation is already in progress.

data.name: VRSettingsException_None
data.value: No settings error occurred.

data.name: VRSettingsException_IPCFailed
data.value: IPC communication with the settings system failed.

data.name: VRSettingsException_WriteFailed
data.value: Failed to write the setting.

data.name: VRSettingsException_ReadFailed
data.value: Failed to read the setting.

data.name: VRSettingsException_JsonParseFailed
data.value: Failed to parse the settings file as JSON.

data.name: VRSettingsException_UnsetSettingHasNoDefault
data.value: The setting is unset and has no default value.

data.name: TrackedPropertyException_TrackedProp_Success
data.value: The tracked property operation completed successfully.

data.name: TrackedPropertyException_TrackedProp_WrongDataType
data.value: The data type of the requested property is incorrect.

data.name: TrackedPropertyException_TrackedProp_WrongDeviceClass
data.value: This property is not available for this device class.

data.name: TrackedPropertyException_TrackedProp_BufferTooSmall
data.value: The buffer size for storing the property is insufficient.

data.name: TrackedPropertyException_TrackedProp_UnknownProperty
data.value: The specified property does not exist.

data.name: TrackedPropertyException_TrackedProp_InvalidDevice
data.value: The specified device is invalid.

data.name: TrackedPropertyException_TrackedProp_CouldNotContactServer
data.value: Could not contact the OpenVR server.

data.name: TrackedPropertyException_TrackedProp_ValueNotProvidedByDevice
data.value: This property value is not provided by the device.

data.name: TrackedPropertyException_TrackedProp_StringExceedsMaximumLength
data.value: The string exceeds the maximum allowed length.

data.name: TrackedPropertyException_TrackedProp_NotYetAvailable
data.value: The property value is not yet available.

data.name: TrackedPropertyException_TrackedProp_PermissionDenied
data.value: Access to the property was denied.

data.name: TrackedPropertyException_TrackedProp_InvalidOperation
data.value: An invalid property operation was performed.

data.name: TrackedPropertyException_TrackedProp_CannotWriteToWildcards
data.value: Cannot write to a wildcard property.

data.name: TrackedPropertyException_TrackedProp_IPCReadFailure
data.value: An error occurred while reading via IPC.

data.name: TrackedPropertyException_TrackedProp_OutOfMemory
data.value: The property operation failed due to insufficient memory.

data.name: TrackedPropertyException_TrackedProp_InvalidContainer
data.value: The specified property container is invalid.
